entry.title: Re: New MDG implementation for supplier module - Restrict...
entry.content:
Hi @studencp Agree, i would like to confirm if its some configuration enabling as the trace doesn't check for any authorization groups (see attached). I would prefer to check configuration before performing any custom coding. 

 

SAP MDG security guide says "B_BUPA_GRP - This authorization object is optional. You need to assign this
authorization object only if master data records are to be specifically protected.". 

 

Additionally, it says "If you want to restrict the authorizations for users or roles to specific values, go to Create Authorizations for Data Model and define which entity types and attributes are authorization
relevant." - Did anyone perform this?

entry.title: Re: Best Solution to connect SAP Business Objects BI open...
entry.content: create sso between BI and BW (if you have OLAP as data source). Then create sso between BW and Fiori. There will be no user prompt

entry.title: Re: Padding is invalid and cannot be removed

we have not tried yet, in the last comment the user is asking is this right step.
Please provide us with a solution ASAP.

entry.title: Where can I find the change number used in MM12 transaction?
entry.content: I ran tcode MM12, entering a material and change number.  I made a change to the x-plant material status.  In tcode MM14 I can see the pending change, but how do I find the change number that I used?  MM14 does not show that.

entry.title: Are functional locations required in EAM
entry.content:
I understand the concept of Functional Location in EAM. However I dont know that I see the need. Are they required?

I could just as easly create the Tech Object for equipment and assign tasks to it with materials required in each operation.

I dont know that I see the need to create maintenance order against a funtional location.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content:
Hi @Jayesh65 
How can we help you?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Switch on gCTS (for existing packages)
entry.content: Thank You for the clarification, @Karin

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice for storing attachment file...
entry.content:
Hello @beampakorn 

Storage of attachment in database tables is in my opinion best practices. It can pass if attachments are really slow. Otherwise you are stuffing the database with large objects that don't need to be accessed very quickly. That is waste of DB space. Instead a dedicated content server should be used e.g. SAP Content Server

Attachments can then be stored and access with ArchiveLink interface.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP condição de pagamento - lançar valores parcelas / fixos
entry.content: I understand that this subject is old, but it was possible to apply this adjustment in Brazil?

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Release of 4X8
entry.content:
Hi @Edrilan_Berisha .

That's good news. Although I'm wondering if one can still influence posting area 1 w/o the posting rules? Processing rules are just for posting area 2, right? And especially when we come to the integration with FI-CA, we often just have something like BANK to TECH, aggregated for one transaction code, w/o using posting area 2, because the magic happens in Contract Accounting then.

BR, Sascha

Thomas

entry.title: Re: Where can I learn to to streamline and automate bank statement processing?
entry.content: And you can also refer to the SAP Help Portal documentation - Bank Statement Processing: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/e042e6cb0bae4718ba0e025825f73e88.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Over time calculation for Different WS hours in a same Time Recording Profile
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a requirement below to calculate overtime for 2 employees belongs to same TRP but having different WS.

There's a time profile let's say TRP_01

2 users are part of this TRP but, both the users have 2 different work schedules example user X has 40 hours of WS and User Y has 48 hours of work schedules. 

Now, the requirement is - When the user Y records hours above 48 hours it should tag as Overtime under Time Valuation result, 

Where as for user X, anything above 40 hours should tag as Overtime Time Valuation result. Is this possible achieving? If no, then what can be the workaround for this issue?

Best Regards,

Somashree

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Wroclaw Request: Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python

Hi Colleagues,

We'd be grateful for your approval to host SAP CodeJam in Wroclaw. Please, see details below:

Topic: Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python
City: Wroclaw, Poland

entry.title: Re: How to extend transaction FAGLL03H with custom fields
entry.content:
Hi Hveziris.

I followed the blog's instructions to add a custom field to the structures(SGLPOS_N_GL_CT), but when I tried to activate the HDBView using TCode: HDBVIEWS , it showed an error message say that "V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT" is Not Active in DDIC.

I'm not sure how to fix this problem. Can you please help?

Thanks

Babu

Thanks

entry.title: Missing Adaptation after Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello, I am adapting an the Standard Manage Purchase Orders App. My adaption works and can be seen when  using App preview in BAS (Business Application Studio).

I have deployed the app with out a problem in using deployment. Given the manifest below

{
  "fileName": "manifest",
  "layer": "CUSTOMER_BASE",
  "fileType": "appdescr_variant",
  "reference": "ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.po.manage.st.s1",
  "id": "customer.very.demure",
  "namespace": "apps/ui.ssuite.s2p.mm.pur.po.manage.st.s1/appVariants/customer.very.demure/",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "content": [
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "@i18n"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport|C_PurchaseOrderTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ListReport/C_PurchaseOrderTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderItemTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderItemTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_addNewModelEnhanceWith",
    "content": {
        "modelId": "i18n|sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage|C_PurchaseOrderLimitItemTP"
    },
    "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/ObjectPage/C_PurchaseOrderLimitItemTP/i18n.properties"
    }
},
    {
    "changeType": "appdescr_ui5_setMinUI5Version",
    "content": {
        "minUI5Version": "1.114.9"
    }
},
    {
      "changeType": "appdescr_app_setTitle",
      "content": {},
      "texts": {
        "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties"
      }
    }
  ]
}
After deploy the next step requires Target mapping configuration. 
How do I configure the target mapping to ensure that the Variant App shows up on screen and the Adaptation is also there.
Currently the Adaptation part doesn't show up

 



Thank you for your answers Experts

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content:
Hi All , 

If any one is still  still experiencing unauthorised access to the Integration Suite, Try to open it in a different browser .

Thanks

Rishabh

entry.title: Re: Erro de atribuição: nenhuma linha encontrada na tabel...
entry.content:
Essa tabela interna IT_NFE_IMPOSTO_ICMS é responsável por receber e mapear os valores de ICMS e ICMS ST para o bloco de ICMS no XML. Será preciso revisar a nota fiscal e verificar se existe algum item que esteja faltando informação de ICMS, na minha análise eu identifiquei que o item 59 da nota que estava com esse problema não tem informação de ICMS.

Nota fiscal na Etapa 8



NF com Erro de atribuição: nenhuma linha encontrada na tabela IT_NFE_IMPOSTO_ICMS


Item que está faltando a informação de imposto de ICMS, item 59, nesse item só tem informação de IPI.

Nesse caso será preciso revisar os itens da NF e verificar se existe mais itens faltando a informação do ICMS. Depois de ajustar a NF é só fazer o procedimento de Reenviar.

Atenciosamente
André Tavares Maris

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration for data services - Product Positioning and Direction
entry.content: Tenant migration guide is planned to be published by end of september , As mentioned in SAP Note 3494037, please note that planned schedules are subject to change.

entry.title: New CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition
entry.content:
As part of the Enterprise Support Cloud Edition offering, we’re excited to announce the launch of a new Continuous Quality Check (CQC) SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition focused on assisting you in transitioning from SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 to SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding. The new service will be live  and available to SAP customers on September 16th. 

The CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition is designed to provide a comprehensive evaluation of the transition process from Onboarding 1.0 to Onboarding. 

Benefits of this service:

  • The benefits of this service include:
  • Review current settings, use of features, and enablement of key functions.
  • Analyze effort required for the transition.
  • Receive a detailed service report that highlights effort required and key areas for consideration not only for current enabled features but also for not enabled features and features only available in new Onboarding version.
  • Optimize the possibility for a smooth transition journey.

Please check the CQC SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition infosheet in SAP Support Portal Page to learn about the key features and benefits of this service, when to use it (or not) and further details of the delivery.

How to request the service:

Remote Services can be requested via the Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  • Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  • Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Value Maps are a support and empowerment program from SAP Enterprise Support and are available to you via the SAP Learning Hub. A one-time sign in with your S User is required, and everything thereafter is free as part of your entitlements. We provide:

  • Prescriptive Guidance
  • Empowerment
  • Social Collaboration
  • Expert Access

Check out the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page  for more and start engaging today!

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Quality Issue Resolution Custom Methodologies in S/4HANA Private Cloud or On-premi
entry.content: Nice Blog and much waited solution.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano

 

my name is ahmed wael sap basis consultant and I'm excited to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work for an organization called Edraky,
which is focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. I'm writing to apply for certification  Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionC_S4CPB.

entry.title: Re: How to record the class not to delete the item from t...
entry.content:
Hi Dominika,

What you described is the expected design and behaviour of our solution.

A class is a scheduled "materialisation" of an item.

When the class is attended, the completion is recorded against the item itself (not its class).

Meaning that when the item is completed, it disappears from the learning plan and moves to the learning history.

If you wish/need to have two autumn/spring class sessions, the system will require two instructor-led items, from which scheduling respective classes will be possible. KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: How to book a room when creating a class in SAP LMS?
entry.content:
Good day @lilymar,

Currently, our LMS does not have a productized integration with Exchange/Outlook to support the scenario that you describe.

It is possible though to import the full list of rooms in the LMS, so they serve as references, are available resources when classes are scheduled, and are inserted in email/vCal notifications sent to the participant.

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: PickList difference with b1 client with Service Layer
entry.content: Hello, I am facing same issue you described above and cannot find the solution to update a Pick List document using POST and PATCH. The document gets updated but seems to be broken after update. Were you able to find any solution for this issue? Thanks and regards, Gabriel

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
    • I want to upskill myself in SAP technology and to study SAP rigorously and get a job opportunity soon.I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

entry.title: Re: How and when to truncate log file in database mirroring setup (SQL Anywhere 17.0.11.7458)
entry.content:
AFAIK, you simply cannot truncate the current log in a HA setup because the mirror relies on that - see here.

Instead, you can rename the log, and lateron delete the renamed log, and the log backup on the mirror will be deleted, too.

entry.title: RETURN PURCHASE ORDER
entry.content:
Hi

 

I would like to know if there is a way to delete or archive a return purchase order that was partially dispatched.  Some item lines were deleted and the rest was dispatched.  Now it lies on my open RPO report.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Bala,

entry.title: Re: Custom mapping task LTMOM
entry.content:
Hello,

please use the migration object modeler (transaction LTMOM) to achieve, what you need. You can create an own rule and assign a translation object (own, if needed) and assign this to your field, which you want to map in the mapping task functionality of the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. Please check the deep-dive-slides for the migration object modeler chapter 2.4. rules & translation objects (slide 80ff). There you also find an example how to create an own rule.

You find all training-materials for the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit on our central landing page in the section Learning -> Training material.

I hope this helps you to create your own rule and translation object.

Best regards, Kirstin

entry.title: Action precheck doesn't flag the fields on the screen (Fiori Elements w/ RAP service)
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to implement a precheck on my Behavior Def. to prevent an action from getting fired before a certain condition is met.

BehDef. - precheck for GetQuotes action

Beh. Imp. - I'm filling the reported and failed tables with the fields that have failed to meet the condition (ie. Terminal, CounterParty, ContractDateTime) 

The $batch request response sent from the S/4HANA system when this validation error occurs is the following:

 

{"error":{"code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":{"lang":"en","value":"Please fill all mandatory fields to get quotes"},"innererror":{"application":{"component_id":"","service_namespace":"/SAP/","service_id":"xxxxx","service_version":"0001"},"transactionid":"F147E0AD61C60120E0066DF79D7FC785","timestamp":"","Error_Resolution":{"SAP_Transaction":"","SAP_Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)","Batch_SAP_Note":"See
SAP Note 1869434 for details about working with $batch (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1869434)"},"errordetails":[{"ContentID":"id-1726152164082-309","code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":"Please
fill all mandatory fields to get quotes","propertyref":"","severity":"error","transition":true,"target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"]}]}}}

 

 There we can see the targets were mapped correctly: "..."target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"

I'm expecting this to be enough for the Fiori Elements framework to interpret the error content and flag the target fields on the screen but it doesn't happen. Instead, it just shows a message on a popup.

Is there any other way to flag the wrong fields on the screen?

entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content: So far, I have found that FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA which internally uses ABAP Class: "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica" (this same class is used in idoc which would create inbound delivery) to create delivery in EWM. However, if I try to use this class or FM directly in my ABAP report, it would throw exception "/SCWM/CX_TM_USAGE". The ST22 runtime long text says, "PROG/ Z_TEST_CREATE_IBDLV is not an external interface; contact administrator". On investigating further, I found out that this class would validate a few things like checking if the program type is RFC or IDOC. If it is a regular ABAP program of type "PROG" it will raise this exception. I am trying to call the function in qRFC and see whether that works.

entry.title: Join SAP at the SLB Digital Forum in Monaco
entry.content:
SAP is joining the Schlumberger Digital Forum as a platinum sponsor. Taking place in Monaco from September 16-19, this major industry event unites over 1400 industry leaders and professionals from around the globe. Participants can choose from over 300 technical sessions by more than 80 different companies, all under the theme “Navigating new frontiers,” discussing how innovations in AI, data, IIOT, edge and cloud computing are vital to overcoming the world’s energy challenges: security, affordability, and sustainability.

SAP’s CEO Christian Klein is attending the event as a plenary speaker, sharing his expertise in a panel titled “Pioneering a new future,” alongside Nikesh Arora, CEO and chairman of Palo Alto Networks, and Scott Guthrie, Executive Vice President of the Cloud and AI group, Microsoft. Together, they will explore the potential transformative impact of AI and its role in the industry. Christian will share his expertise on topics such as Cloud as the future of enterprise computing, Business AI as a game changer for administrative and industry processes, and how technology supports the energy transition.

Further, experts from SAP are presenting cutting-edge technology to support Oil, Gas and Energy companies in bringing out their best. Find out how SAP Business AI is transforming the industry, learn about the latest innovations in managing new forms of energy, and much more.

Visit the website

entry.title: Re: Replicating table data from an SAP ECC system with SAP Datasphere using Replication Flows
entry.content:
@tomas_koubek Sorry since the change in the interface, I missed a few questions.

In the SAP Datasphere (and SLT) documentation, this scenario is possible with ECC >= 4.6C. So you need to verify the valid version of DMIS Addon that you have to install on your ECC system to insure that it will be able to communicate with your standalone SLT. To verify this, check the valid version of the standalone SLT - being at the lowest, a DMIS 2018 SP06, for it to work with SAP Datasphere.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3010969/E

Meaning a DMIS 2010 SP10. If you can install at least this version on your ECC tenant, you should be ok.

Best regards,

R.

entry.title: Secure OCI - Initialize backend call
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new in SAP and I am going to integrate the Secure OCI with the eCommerce website of our customer.

I am following the documentation inside "Open Catalog Interface (OCI) Release 5.0" pdf document; could you please share an example of INITIALIZE backend call? Is it an HTTP POST call? In case, with a JSON or XML body?

Thank you,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Balu, if this suffice your requirement https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/determine-if-valid-date-via-sql/qaq-p/9506869

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear all,

Unfortunately there was an issue in the model definition of the Analytic Model "SAP_SD_RL_SalesDocumentItem_V2" with the latest SAP Datasphere release

This has by now been fixed and an updated version of the package has been released yesterday.

Please re-import the latest version of the business content package "Sales Analysis for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud" from Sept. 11, 2024 (version 1.2.1).

Best regards,

Guido

entry.title: How can we use wire transfer as payment method for employees´payments?
entry.content:
We are a company located in the UK. We pay our local suppliers' invoices by bank transfer.
Our house bank is located in London, Supplier has bank account in London.
In this case, Business ByDesign select wire transfer as the payment format.

We reimburse our employees' travel expenses in the UK by bank transfer.
Our house bank is located in London, Employees bank account is in London, too.
Here we cannot carry out the payment method wire transfer.
Business ByDesign always uses bank transfer as payment method. 

How can we use payment method wire transfer for employee payments ?

entry.title: How works LZB (SCB) with transaktion MRKO
entry.content:
Hello Experts:

If we do MM consignation invoice for the foreign vendor with MRKO, the error message is LZB(SCB) for the account missing... We have to keep the settings that the account is required with LZB. Is there any way to solve the problem? where and how can LZB be automatically written into FI document in this process, there is no way to input it during the automally invoice creation.

entry.title: RFC Callback Positive List Mass Activation
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to do a mass RFC Callback Positive List Activation, instead of doing it for each RFC destination individually?

Thanks,

Jason

entry.title: After pFAL CP is not getting created in SRM
entry.content:
i have an employee and position id in SAP ECC and when i do PFAL it says IDOC processed successfully but in SRM system the CP is not getting created and the position doesn't also show A008 holder of this EE id. 

OBJECTS: Org Unit, Position, Pernr, Position Holder, Personal Data, Address  were maintained correctly in ECC. 

Please suggest, how to get the CP push to SRM system.

entry.title: How can I discover what instance is the Primary Application Server?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I'm creating a python application and I need to know on a ABAP system, what application server is the primary (also called Central Instance).

I'm able to retrieve all application servers by scanning /sapmnt/<SID>/profile but I also need which one is the PAS.

Thank you in advance for your suggestions.

Best regards,

Bruno

entry.title: Build Failing with Client runtime version 4.11.167
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are developing an build app for a extension scenario in SAP Service Cloud V2.

When we try to build the app either as ZIP or MTAR, we see build fails with below error.

{
	"buildId": "37949",
	"appId": "137347",
	"buildLogError": "AB version: 2.13.4
COMMAND: 

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone_mtar -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone_mtar -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r"
}

Thanks,

Jamal

entry.title: Re: Behavior validation messages are not displayed
entry.content: In my case Messages are displayed when %state_area is removed, but still fields are not highlighted.

entry.title: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content: In the GUI system, we could select the receiving WBS and sending WBS with KSW1. Then we could perform the deployment with KSW5. How can I do this in the Public Cloud system?

entry.title: Re: Consumption based customer invoicing
entry.content:
Hi Doris,

Who owns the gas in part 1?  Is it customer X?

And who are the customers getting involved by in part 2?

Kind regards,

Paul

entry.title: Error Printing a rpt in a Shipping
entry.content:
Has anyone seen this error before? We use a shipping software and users are printing to PDF a BOL if they are a new user it does not print, but old users it works fine. We can disable the parameters in the software and it works no problem, but we need the parameters. 

I feel like it's a reset of some sort but not sure where to look. 

Greatly appreciated. ChoCha'

entry.title: Re: Select With Internal Table
entry.content: Could you paste the code in text, definition of lt_odv (explicit or inplicit) and the long text on the second line of error (after 'or it is a')

entry.title: Re: Where can I find the change number used in MM12 trans...
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you check CDHDR table, I hope you will find it there.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking to prepare for SAP Project Manager Certification. There are two options; 1) C_ACT_2403 and 2) E_ACTAI_2043. For both, it shows I need to Prepare for ACT100 and ACT200. So what is the difference between the two certifications?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Unable side menu on Zebra - RF - Personas
entry.content: Yes, apparently the editor does not see certain properties of objects because they are not exposed. You cannot fix it yourself, this would need a fix from the Personas client side. However, the command will still work.

entry.title: Re: The number of thread at Os level is always grater tha...
entry.content: Hi thanks a lot but if i understood the notes its a Solaris behavior. I my case, RH 8.10, all the installation have only 5 threads more then the value attended

entry.title: Re: Issue for getting Output Format for a SQVI query
entry.content: No it's still not coming, it's just expanding the 'Selection' Section for me

entry.title: The print button I created in the toolbar is not working properly.
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

I created a "print button" in the toolbar. When I click the print button, the output screen appears, but since the program does not leave the ALV screen, the ALV screen appears on top of the output screen and for this reason I cannot see the output screen properly.




First Screen :




After selecting a line in ALV, I click the print button :


I select the output device, then I click the print preview(yazdırma öngörünümü) :




Actually, the output view appears on the screen, but the ALV does not leave the screen.





I tried "ALV refresh" but it did not work. How can I remove the ALV from the screen?



Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Restricting Multiple value using Constraint
entry.content: I don't think that it is possible in classical LO-VC to restrict the domain of a multi-value characteristic using a constraint. That's only possible with S/4 advanced variant configuration.

entry.title: Re: How to exclude PO from MRP calculation in S4 Hana Pub...
entry.content:
Hello @Ketan7kar 

I don't think reorder point planning procedure is the correct approach in your situation. Have a look at how ROP works - SAP Help Reorder Point Planning Procedure

Your reorder point needs to be high enough to cover requirements during the replenishment time. Your replenishment time is quite long, 120 days and your storage capacity is limited. I guess you can't keep 120 days worth of stock.

Why don't you use regular, PD type MRP planning process instead?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Databricks jdbc 10220 Driver doesn't support this optional feature
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to connect to Azure Databricks DB using JDBC sender adapter from SAP PO 7.5 single stack.

We have installed the Azure Databricks driver on SAP PO server using the link provided by Azure..

But, still we get the following error while pinging the JDBC sender channel from monitoring page.

Could you please guide if you have such experience while connecting to Azure Databricks DB from SAP PO.. thank you!

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Invalid entry in Time profile in Production scheduling board
entry.content:
In SIMG Advanced Planning - Apps for Material Requirements Planning - General Settings - Maintain Time Profiles the time profile is maintained .

Why its showing error.

entry.title: Re: Restricting Multiple value using Constraint
entry.content:
I don't think that it is possible in classical LO-VC to restrict the domain of a multi-value characteristics using a constraint.
You should not even be able to set the 'restrictable' flag for a multi-value cstics.

Workaround: Assign a separate precondition to each of the values of the multi-value cstic CHAR2 and try to use the variant table from there:

TABLE TABLE1 {
CHAR1 = $self.char1,
CHAR2 = '1' <- different in each precondition: must be the value to which the precondition is assigned
}

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to extract data both in Live and Data Acquisition mode for my SAC Report. It is a public Cloud edition and the extraction I need have specific needs so I chose eclipse to build the CDS (CDS Name is ZTEST). Data preview is good. So

STEPS I FOLLOWED:

1. Create a CDS View ZTEST ( it calls I_GLAccountLineItem) it has certain authorization objects (Not sure whther these authorization automatically extends to the calling CDS ZTEST) 

2.  I created a Service Definition to my newly created CDS View (ZTEST_SERVICE).

3. I created two different Service Bindings. One with InA - UI and OData V2 - Web API (2 Bindings)

4. OData V2 - Web API created a Service URL (/sap/opu/odata/ZTEST) and an Entity Set and Association as ZTEST.

- OData Service URL with full path extracts data in the browser (I think this as a minimum guarentee to bring data to SAC) 

- When I try to create a Data Acquisition model it showed the query, let me Build Odata Service Query and when I try to create the query , I got an error 

The user does not have permission to access the requested resource.
Correlation ID: 30444370-1995-4409-9954-495703651595
(May be this is very specific to the user not having access to the underlying CDS Access? Not sure)
5. InA - UI created a familiar External Service name with 2CZTEST

   Live Data Model attepmpt - External Service name 2CZTEST shows up and upon selection it flashes the key figure value (model is still building) and throws an error:   

Server Error: Error [Server]: You do not have start authorization for R3TR INA1 ZTEST_DDL2_INA_BINDING, return code 4.
Correlation ID: 40361062-2532-4327-9467-617666356051
 
Appreciate all the help I can get.
 
Thank you,
Arthur.

entry.title: Re: Released Production order without cost estimate
entry.content: Please share source code

entry.title: S4 Public Cloud: CDS view for batch characteristics values
entry.content:
Hello all!

We are in public cloud and have a simple requirement - to create a CDS view with the following outputs:

- Batch Number

- Characteristic

- Characteristic Values

I have been exploring all available data views, the closest I have found is: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate

With this view the output am getting is:

And this does not give me what we need. 

Could you please recommend other views which I can turn into a CDS view just to get the batch characteristics?

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Re: Cast CHAR to DEC in CDS View
entry.content:
Hi All,
@rowieforms Could you share the solution, I have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: gCTS is still here
entry.content:
Hi @Karin ,

 

Thanks for this information (still alive). I've tested previous version of Git CTS and I was supprised to see that customizing is not readable on Git, you know that a customizing entry is in git but you can't explore it's value. Do you plan to build such fearture?

As being able to explore customizing change over time on a system (productive one) is sometime fundamental to solve or limit productive issues.

While on developement we are no longer blind with Git CTS we still totaly blind on customizing TR. I hope you'll fix that soon.

Kind regards.

Taryck.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST: change posting key for vendor...
entry.content: Can you please provide the more information . we also have similar requirement.

entry.title: Re: gCTS is still here
entry.content:
Hi @Karin ,

An other topic for me is about the integration of Git CTS with Cloud ALM.
I do not see any support/connexion/or integration with Cloud ALM in Cloud ALM Roadmap.
Nor in your collegue Cay Rademann document : Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud – SAP Cloud ALM or SAP Solution Manager?

Do you have any information on this topic ?
Can we use Git CTS on/with Cloud ALM ? If no when will it be possible ?

entry.title: Re: ASE has problems w/new disk controllers with 4 kbyte...
entry.content:
FYI, CR 829700 has been created for this problem (but it doesn't show up in the "SAP for Me Knowledge Search" yet)

Ben

entry.title: Re: Two-tier ERP and Group Reporting: Deployment Options with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Just my two cents here, GRDC is not part of Group Reporting resides in ABAP stack. It is java based SaaS solution on top of BTP, though it consumes API implemented via ABAP language in S/4. So for diaragram 1 and 2, it might make sense to take GRDC out of the second box.
BTW, it is appreciated if diaragram 3 could mention how accounting document in public cloud is being replicated into ACDOCA private cloud such as SLT or the reference to https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/sap-central-finance-cloud-or-on-premise/ba-p/13576896

entry.title: Re: How to upgrade SAP diagnostic agent.
entry.content: Are you sure that when we updated the LM-Service that all connected agents will be updated also ?

entry.title: Assertion failed in app F2568 Manage Production Versions when mass consistency check
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm using the app F2568 Manage Production Versions. In the first window, when I mark only one row and then click on consistency check, it makes the consistency check correctly. But when I mark two or more rows to make a massive consistency check, it appears the error ASSERTION_FAILED like the next picture

In transaction ST22 the dump says the error is in the next program

When I used S/4HANA 2022 I didn't have this problem when did the mass consistency check, but now I'm working in the S/4HANA 2023 version.

I would know if there is a correction to make the app works like in the previous version.

Thanks and regards

entry.title: Re: Query as InfoProvider - SAP HANA Runtime Transformation
entry.content:
It looks like the answer is No.

After playing around with this for a while (including introducing an infosource layer) we were unable to use the 'Hana Runtime'.

entry.title: Custom user attribute does not appear as an option in OMDO configuration
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a custom User Attribute in Configpanel in the custom namespace (Z) as per documentation:

Configuring Mobile User Attributes | SAP Help Portal

However, once created, it does not appear in the Attribute list for the user in (/n/syclo/admin -> administration -> user management -> user attributes). It also does not appear in OMDO filter configuration value list when using Mobile user attribute option.

Any help on this?

Best regards.
Gonzalo.

entry.title: Re: how can I have a dynamic text with dimension input co...
entry.content: Thank you Simon and Mastan.

entry.title: Re: Missing Adaptation after Deployment to Fiori Launchpad
entry.content: can you try removing the url in your target mapping? only ID needed.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting Currency Translation Rounding Rules & Errors:
entry.content: Nice blog. Just one question whether the two scenarios are relevant to note 3474581 and note 3233850 respectively?

entry.title: New NSQ Location Group Member.
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues - New Member of the NSQ Location Group.  My product area of focus is Public Cloud ERP (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition) and my topic area of focus is Project Mgmt (SAP Activate).  Been with SAP 20 Years and enjoy being in NSQ as often as possible.  Looking forward to participating in NSQ events / "Stammtisch" related to the this location group.  Thank you. 

@lauraschmitz @jerryjanda @seanlavelle

entry.title: Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF
entry.content: We are working on integrating Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF, with NO other intermediary. The plan is to have ADF trigger a task chain in Datasphere and once the task chain completes the necessary activity, then, initiate a PULL request using ADF for pulling data from Datasphere into Snowflake. How can we establish the connectivity/integration between Datasphere and Snowflake. Can you provide us with the detailed steps to configure and test the same.

entry.title: Re: how can I have a dynamic text with dimension input co...
entry.content: Actually, it's like Simon said, the dynamic text will be in the popup window, it's not a simple dynamic text that will appear in the page story. I need to show what filter are being applied to the page, from the dimension input control. Not story filter, still, it was helpful understing the limitations. Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to check the fiori app that is enabled
entry.content: tcode sicf to check /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/hcm_lrq_cre

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to check the fiori app that is enabled
entry.content: /iwfnd/maint_service to check HCM_LEAVE_REQ_CREATE_SRV

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content: SP19 release is tentatively scheduled towards the end of this year. However, the mentioned feature will only allow disabling the virtual keyboard for an input field for good, i.e. this means that there will be no way to enable it on demand when you manually set focus onto a field. For the described scenario, you should follow the scripted solution posted above.

entry.title: Re: Add NativeScript UI Chart as external plugin to MDK Exte​nsion App
entry.content: This is really an excellent information!

entry.title: Re: New NSQ Location Group Member.
entry.content: Thanks for the tag @caseydevlin, I've just joined the group as well!

entry.title: Re: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - How to create a Premise

entry.title: Re: Quedada SAP en Honest Greens Castellana
entry.content: Nos vemos allí 😉

entry.title: Re: gCTS is still here
entry.content:
Hi Taryck,

 

the integration of gCTS in CALM is not yet available and I don't have any timeline when it will be available...sorry... but for sure, we know that this is a topic we need to think about and plan for it.

(Concerning the values for customizing, I need to check - I will come back)

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: The CDS View has Billed Date in DATS Format in S/4 HANA. This reflects as STRING in Datasphere
entry.content: I consume a CDS View from my S/4 HANA Connection as a Remote Table in Datasphere. The Column Billed Date represented as DATS Data Type in S/4 HANA, is incoming to Datasphere in my CDS View Remote Table as STRING. What should I do to get the Data Type as Date in my CDS View Remote Table in Datasphere.

entry.title: Re: System does not allow posting from EWM to IM-MM if th...
entry.content: Thanks for your prompt response

entry.title: Change BP Grouping ( Account Group ) in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear All,

We can't change bp grouping.

We run BP transaction.

The button to change in Customer:General Data shows the message :

" Re-direct to account group change functionality".

After that we push "Enter" button and the system leave to BP transaction. So we've not to option to change the grouping.  

Pls, any solution? 

Thnks in advance.

entry.title: Re: System does not allow posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs
entry.content: Any customization is required for this scenario?

entry.title: liberation strategy connection
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
I have the following question:
in my company we want to implement the approval and request of orders through the “my inbox” application of fiori.
currently we have an approval strategy implemented in sap gui, then the question is: if we implement the my inbox application, could an approval strategy using sap gui be used together with the my inbox application of fiori?
i.e. if the purchase order has to go through 3 approvers, could 2 approvers use sap gui and 1 approver use my inbox?
I have not found any official sap information on this and it would help me to have it, also obviously if you answer me to this question.
Thank you very much and if you have any doubt please reply me to clarify my question,
